summary: Enhanced Investor Deck (16 slides) testing completed successfully. Backend: 2/2 API endpoints PASSED. Frontend: All 16 slides verified with correct content. Password gate, navigation (arrows, keyboard, nav dots), autoplay toggle, and contact form all working.
critical_code_review_comments: Good: Slide counter correctly shows 01/16 through 16/16
Good: All 8 trademarkable names displayed with TM badges in IP Portfolio slide
Good: AI Pipeline slide shows all 4 phases (Document Remediation, Biometric Passport, AI Conductor Mode, Evidence Package)
Good: Feature Breakdown shows 11 categories summing to 67 total features
Good: Architecture slide displays all system layers (Frontend, API Gateway, Service Layer, Background Workers, MongoDB)
Good: Tech Stack includes CoinGecko in Integrations column
Good: Infrastructure slide shows Kubernetes, CI/CD, Monitoring, Graceful Degradation
Good: Metrics slide displays 8 key platform numbers
Good: Market slide shows $18.6B, 43 States, 67+ correctly
Good: 16 nav dots with correct labels for direct navigation
Good: Contact form submission works and shows success message
seed_data_creation: Test contact form submissions created in investor_inquiries collection during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Enhanced Investor Deck at /investor-deck fully working with 16 slides. Previous iteration had 10 slides. New slides added: IP Portfolio (8 TMs), AI Pipeline (4 phases), Feature Breakdown (67 features in 11 categories), Architecture (system layers), Infrastructure (Kubernetes, CI/CD), and expanded Metrics. Password: NotaryChain2026!. Navigation via arrows, keyboard, scroll wheel, and 16 nav dots all work. Contact form stores in MongoDB and sends via Resend.
